title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Q1 Loss Of US$56.8 Million Reinforces Bearish Profitability Narrative
text: BigBear.ai Holdings reported a Q1 net loss of $56.8 million, reinforcing concerns about the company's path to profitability. While the company achieved gross margin expansion and grew its backlog, the significant bottom-line losses highlight the challenges of scaling a defense AI business. The net loss did improve from $62 million a year earlier, driven by lower derivative fair value changes, decreased interest expense, and higher gross profit, but the business remains unprofitable and cash-flow negative.
